articles.title: The Meta hack shows thereтАЩs more to AI security than Mythos
articles.description: On June 5, 404 Media reported that attackers had been using MetaтАЩs AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: They asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses that they controlled, and the agent complied. One attacker broke into the dormant Obama Wh
articles.content: On June 5, 404 Media reported that attackers had been using MetaтАЩs AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: They asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses that they controlled, and the agent complied. One attacker broke into the dormant Obama White House account and made pro-Iran posts; others took over accounts with valuable, single-word handles, possibly in order to sell them. AI cybersecurity concerns are nothing new. Since Anthropic anno
articles.author: Grace Huckins

articles.title: Are AI chatbots making us lose control of our brains?

I also had the opportunity to sit down with Gloria Mark, a psychologist at the University of California, Irvine, who has spent the last 30 years studying how people interact with digital techno
articles.content: This week IтАЩve been at SXSW London . ThereтАЩs been music, film, and a lotтАФand I mean a lot тАФof talk about AI. I also had the opportunity to sit down with Gloria Mark, a psychologist at the University of California, Irvine, who has spent the last 30 years studying how people interact with digital technologies. Early in her career, the biggest concerns were the potential impacts of internet and email use on our brains. We may laugh those concerns off today, but itтАЩs true that as the technologies be
articles.author: Jessica Hamzelou

articles.title: This is your laptopтАж on AI
articles.description: We're now deep into developer conference season, and one of the themes so far is the relentless conviction from Big Tech companies that AI is going to change everything about how we do everything. Nvidia's Jensen Huang made that clearer than anyone this week, when he described a completely new way o
articles.content: We're now deep into developer conference season, and one of the themes so far is the relentless conviction from Big Tech companies that AI is going to change everything about how we do everything. Nvidia's Jensen Huang made that clearer than anyone this week, when he described a completely new way of using our laptops - and a completely new kind of laptop made to support it. It's all very interesting, but it raises the same question we have around so many AI products: Does anyone actually want t
articles.author: David Pierce

articles.title: GitHub Universe is back: All together now, in the agentic era
articles.description: GitHub Universe is back: returning to the historic Fort Mason Center in San Francisco on October 28тАУ29, 2026. The post GitHub Universe is back: All together now, in the agentic era appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
articles.content: If you’ve been following all the AI agent conversations and wondering what’s useful versus what’s just noise, you’re not alone. There are ideas everywhere. What’s challenging is finding the time and a practical path from cool demos to workflows that make your day easier. GitHub Universe bridges that gap. Universe is our flagship event for developers and the teams who support them—builders, maintainers, security practitioners, technical leaders, and partners&md
articles.author: Natalie Guevara

articles.title: Great Stack to Doesn't Work #6 тАФ CI/CD: "Pipeline Green, Production Red"
articles.description: A survival guide for when everything goes wrong in production. The pipeline is green. Every stage passed. Tests: green. Lint: green. Build: green. Security scan: green. The deploy button says "Ready." You click it. Five minutes later, the error rate jumps to 15%. The pipeline is still green. It will
articles.content: A survival guide for when everything goes wrong in production. The pipeline is green. Every stage passed. Tests: green. Lint: green. Build: green. Security scan: green. The deploy button says "Ready." You click it. Five minutes later, the error rate jumps to 15%. The pipeline is still green. It will stay green while your users can't check out, because the pipeline tests what you wrote, not what production does with it. Why Your Pipeline Lies to You A green pipeline means your code compiles, your
articles.author: Mehmet TURA├З

articles.description: Money would keep coal plants open, build the first new plants in over a decade.
articles.content: On Thursday, President Donald Trump announced his administration's latest attempt to prop up the US coal industry during an incoherent press event that randomly oscillated between energy issues and Trump's fixation with building and renovating monuments in DC. The energy portion of the events was also frequently disconnected from reality. "Today we're taking historic action to bring down the price of energy and the cost of living for all Americans with the power of clean, beautiful coal," said T
articles.author: John Timmer

articles.title: Review: Spider-Noir recaptures the magic of a bygone era
articles.description: Nicolas Cage was born to play 1930s PI Ben Reilly/The Spider: part Bogart, part Bugs Bunny, 100% Cage-y.
articles.content: My hopes were high for the new Prime Video superhero series Spider-Noir , based on all those amazing trailers . But I also had some trepidation. Could the actual series live up to the hype? As it turns out, yes, it could. Spider-Noir is a triumph, fusing fast-paced storytelling, compelling characters, gorgeous cinematography and production design, and whip-smart dialogue into a hugely entertaining, loving homage to a magical bygone era. (Some spoilers below, but no major reveals.) Read full arti
articles.author: Jennifer Ouellette

articles.title: Keep the Credit Ledger Off-Chain. Checkpoint It On-Chain.
articles.description: I specced an on-chain credit ledger for a compute network, wrote the mint, and then the token program refused to initialize it. The two extensions I needed (non-transferable credits, plus a hook on every movement so the chain could run the accounting) are mutually exclusive on a single Solana mint.
articles.content: I specced an on-chain credit ledger for a compute network, wrote the mint, and then the token program refused to initialize it. The two extensions I needed (non-transferable credits, plus a hook on every movement so the chain could run the accounting) are mutually exclusive on a single Solana mint. The runtime rejects the initialize instruction. That rejection sent me back to the design, and I came out the other side with the ledger off-chain and only a daily checkpoint on-chain. This post is wh
articles.author: Rob

articles.title: In the wake of layoffs, some tech workers are exploring new careers
articles.description: Amid widespread tech layoffs, some highly skilled workers are making radical career changes. Some laid-off workers are turning to lower paying temp jobs, and some are leaving tech altogether.

articles.title: "We pissed off a lot of people": Giant data center plan cut 50% amid protests
articles.description: Developer felt "beaten up," with "no choice" but to shrink data center.
articles.content: One of the world's biggest data center projects was designed to be nearly three times the size of Manhattan, stretching across multiple Utah sites. But intense local backlash in Box Elder County has now pushed the developer to cut the project plans in half before construction starts. Residents' top concern was the Stratos data center project draining local waters, and they were willing to pay to protect them, most especially the vulnerable Great Salt Lake. articles.content: Geoff Keighley’s annual June celebration of games is here. articles.title: S&P 500 blocks fast SpaceX entry, wonтАЩt waive rule for unprofitable AI firms
articles.description: SpaceX wonтАЩt get easy access to billions of dollars from passive investors.
articles.content: SpaceX has requested unusually swift entry into several leading stock market indexes as a condition of its historic stock market debut. But the S&P 500 stock market index representing many of the largest profitable US companies has surprised market analysts by refusing to bend the rules for Elon MuskтАЩs space and AI company. The June 4 decision by S&P Dow Jones Indices тАФthe company that creates and manages stock market indexes such as the S&P 500тАФmeans that SpaceX will not gain accelerated access
articles.author: Jeremy Hsu

articles.content: Whether youтАЩre considering starting a Sonos speaker setup, or adding to an existing group, the Sonos Era 100 is worth picking up. The compact, capable smart speaker is currently marked down to $189 ($30 off) at a variety of retailers, including Amazon , Best Buy , and directly from Sonos . If you want an even lower price, Sonos is selling refurbished Era 100 speakers for just $134. They come with fresh accessories and packaging, and sport the same one-year warranty as its new speakers.
